title: Ready Anytime
subtitle: Final days before arrival
description: By week 38, your baby is fully developed and continues to prepare for birth. You may notice signs that your body is getting ready for labor, and delivery can happen at any time.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements continue but may feel tighter due to limited space
You may experience early signs of labor like contractions or back pain
Your baby continues to gain small amounts of weight
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and light diet
Stay hydrated and rest as much as possible
Be attentive to signs of labor and stay prepared

medical_checkups.note: Frequent monitoring continues as delivery is expected soon.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Monitors maternal health and signs of labor

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor will closely monitor any signs indicating the onset of labor.

important_note: Delivery can occur at any time, so staying prepared is important.
reassurance: Your baby is fully ready, and you are very close to meeting them.
medical_disclaimer: Contact your healthcare provider immediately if you notice regular contractions, water breaking, or any unusual symptoms.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels remains critical as delivery approaches.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be closely monitored before and during delivery.
diabetes.reassurance: Careful management supports a safe delivery.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron supports your body during labor and recovery.
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be reviewed before delivery.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps prepare your body for childbirth.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure is essential for a safe delivery.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring is crucial at this stage.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports a safer delivery.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support stability during labor and delivery.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored as needed.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain balance during this important time.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As delivery is imminent, managing multiple conditions requires careful and consistent attention.
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady care supports a safe and smooth delivery experience.
